meta.title: Online B.Com Degree with Specializations and Job Assistance
meta.description: Earn your Bachelor of Commerce degree online with Teksversity and specialize in Accounting & Finance or International Finance & Accounting.

mainEntity.name: What is the duration and structure of the B.Com course at Teksversity?

acceptedAnswer.text: The Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com) program at Teksversity is a three-year undergraduate degree divided into six semesters. Each semester covers core subjects, electives, and practical learning through case studies and real-world projects designed to build a strong foundation in commerce and finance.

mainEntity.name: What are the main objectives of the B.Com course at Teksversity?

acceptedAnswer.text: The B.Com course at Teksversity aims to build in-depth knowledge of commerce, finance, taxation, accounting, and business management. The program focuses on developing analytical thinking, financial literacy, and business decision-making skills to prepare students for dynamic corporate and entrepreneurial careers.

mainEntity.name: What specializations does the B.Com program offer?

acceptedAnswer.text: Teksversity offers multiple B.Com specializations, including Accounting and Finance, Computer Applications, Banking and Insurance, Business Analytics, and General B.Com. Each specialization helps students focus on specific career paths within commerce, technology, and financial management.

mainEntity.name: What key skills will I gain from the B.Com course at Teksversity?

acceptedAnswer.text: During the B.Com program, students develop financial analysis, accounting, auditing, taxation, and business strategy skills. The course also enhances communication, data interpretation, and managerial abilities, making graduates ready for corporate roles or entrepreneurship.

mainEntity.name: What is the eligibility to apply for the B.Com course?

acceptedAnswer.text: Students who have completed 10+2 or equivalent from a recognized board are eligible to apply. While having a background in Commerce or Mathematics is preferred, students from other streams can also pursue B.Com with the right interest in business and finance.

mainEntity.name: What are the major subjects covered in the B.Com syllabus?

acceptedAnswer.text: The B.Com curriculum at Teksversity includes Financial Accounting, Business Law, Cost Accounting, Economics, Auditing, Income Tax, and Management Principles. Each subject is designed to build a strong theoretical and practical understanding of commerce and business operations.

mainEntity.name: What are the higher education options after completing B.Com?

acceptedAnswer.text: After earning a B.Com degree, students can pursue M.Com, MBA, CA, CMA, CS, CFA, or Postgraduate Diplomas in finance, data analytics, or business management. Teksversity also provides career counseling and guidance to help students choose the right path for specialization and growth.

mainEntity.name: What career opportunities are available after completing B.Com?

acceptedAnswer.text: B.Com graduates from Teksversity can work as Accountants, Financial Analysts, Auditors, Tax Consultants, Business Executives, or Investment Advisors. The program opens doors to careers in banking, finance, taxation, corporate management, and consulting firms.

mainEntity.name: Does the B.Com program at Teksversity include practical learning?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes! Teksversity emphasizes practical and industry-based learning through case studies, business simulations, accounting projects, and internships. Students gain hands-on experience with financial tools and real-world business environments, bridging theory and practice effectively.

mainEntity.name: Why choose Teksversity for your B.Com degree?

acceptedAnswer.text: Teksversity offers an industry-integrated B.Com curriculum, expert faculty, and 100% placement assistance. The program combines academic learning with practical exposure, career mentorship, and digital accounting tools preparing students for success in the evolving world of commerce.

reserveYourSpotForm.formDescription: Start your learning journey today. Our experts will reach out to guide you in your next big step!

heading: The overview of
Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com)
overViewOfOnline.subHeading: Build a Career Anchored in Commerce, Finance, and Global Business
overViewOfOnline.description: Teksversity’s Online B.Com program offers an advanced learning pathway for aspiring professionals in business, accounting, and global finance. The program blends conceptual understanding with digital learning, practical insights, and analytical skill development. With specializations in Accounting & Finance and International Finance & Accounting, it helps learners gain global perspectives, master financial systems, and build strategic acumen for thriving in today’s competitive economy.
keyPoints: Industry-driven curriculum designed for future business leaders
Applied learning through business simulations and data analytics
Emphasis on international finance practices and standards
Real-time mentorship from academic and corporate experts
Structured progression from fundamentals to advanced financial strategy

heading: Why Choose Teksversity for You
Bachelor of Commerce Degree?
title: 13 Years of
Legacy
(Commitment, Growth, Success)
whyOnline.initialDescription: At Teksversity, education is built around flexibility, relevance, and outcomes. The B.Com program is curated for learners who aspire to balance academic excellence with career advancement through an adaptive online platform. Students learn at their own pace with structured support from faculty and mentors.

description.firstDescription: Our learning model connects theory to practice through exposure to case-based problem-solving, digital finance tools, and real-world challenges. Each learner develops a strong command of accounting principles, global business ethics, and market-driven decision-making.

description.secondDescription: Beyond academics, Teksversity focuses on overall professional development from leadership building and communication mastery to corporate readiness. With access to peer collaboration, industry sessions, and a supportive mentorship network, students are guided toward confident and impactful careers.

keyPoints: Real-world financial case studies and simulations
Accounting, auditing, and taxation workshops
Business communication and analytical reasoning training
Expert sessions from finance and corporate professionals
Research-based projects and applied business assignments
Cross-disciplinary collaboration and teamwork
Interactive assessments and continuous evaluation
Globally aligned curriculum with industry relevance
Personalized mentorship and academic guidance
24/7 access to online learning resources
Recorded sessions and digital study materials
Continuous progress tracking and feedback
Dedicated technical and academic support
Internship and certification guidance
Flexible schedules for professionals and learners
Regular mentorship reviews and progress monitoring
100% placement and internship assistance
Resume and LinkedIn profile development
Finance and business communication training
Career counseling and interview preparation
Collaboration with corporate and financial partners
Alumni interaction and expert mentoring
Confidence-building and personality development sessions
Career progression and job-readiness workshops
Group case discussions and financial debates
Cross-specialization collaborations and business competitions
Guest lectures and expert Q&A sessions
Alumni success talks and career insights
Student-led virtual business events
Interactive peer discussions and community learning
Global finance webinars and networking opportunities

heading: Download Our
Course Brochure
downloadOurCourseBrochure.description:
Take the first step toward a rewarding commerce career with Teksversity’s Online B.Com program. The brochure provides a comprehensive view of the course structure, career pathways, and the skills you’ll gain to excel in finance, business, and management roles.
It also highlights how Teksversity integrates digital learning, expert mentorship, and practical exposure to create a seamless academic experience tailored to industry needs. Explore, learn, and grow into a finance professional with a global outlook.
downloadOurCourseBrochure.subHeading: What You’ll Get in the Brochure:
highlights: Complete B.Com curriculum and specialization details
Career progression roadmap and skill-building modules
Student support, mentorship, and placement ecosystem

heading: Specializations
specializations.paragraph: Choose from our comprehensive suite of analytics and management solutions

heading: Teksversity
Online Admission Process
OnlineAdmissionProcedure.description: Starting your academic journey is now simpler than ever with our streamlined online admission process. This guide outlines the straightforward steps, from creating your personal student account and submitting basic application details to uploading necessary documents and completing the secure fee payment, all leading to a quick verification and instant admission confirmation.

heading: Upload Documents
steps.details: Submit required certificates and ID proofs.

heading: Document Verification
steps.details: Quick review of documents and payment

testimonialCards.name: Vishal
testimonialCards.review: I took a Data science with ai , IIT Certification course and tejaswi mam helped me to get into the Best course, now I got a job in Accent company with 6.5lpa. Thank you Teksversity Team and special thanks to madam .

testimonialCards.name: Vinitha P
testimonialCards.review: This Dual Certification course in Digital Marketing and Business Analytics is fantastic. The trainers are knowledgeable and the practical projects helped me apply concepts effectively. A must for anyone looking to excel in marketing and analytics!

testimonialCards.name: sadhana chittennoju
testimonialCards.review: I enrolled in the online Data Science course at Teksversity in March 2025. The Python, ML modules, real-world projects, and weekly assignments were very useful. Good placement support. It helped me build a strong portfolio. Great for career switchers

testimonialCards.name: Arun Pasunuri
testimonialCards.course: Data Science with AI and ML
testimonialCards.review: Joining TEKSVERSITY changed the way I learn. The dual certification programs boosted my confidence, and the hands-on training gave me real industry experience. Their zero down-payment EMI support truly helps students. TEKSVERSITY inspires you to grow.

testimonialCards.name: Ramadevi Koduri
testimonialCards.review: Teksversity is the best place to learn dual certification in Digital Marketing and Business Analytics. I wanted to study two relevant courses for my MBA, and their counsellor guided me perfectly. I enrolled in both programs with confidence.

testimonialCards.name: Meghana
testimonialCards.review: My experience with Teksversity was amazing! The counselling session with Sireesha Reddy ma’am at Secunderabad helped me choose the right course. She patiently cleared all my doubts and gave great career clarity.

testimonialCards.name: Divya Peddiwar
testimonialCards.course: Data Science and Python full stack
testimonialCards.review: Teksversity is where growth meets opportunity! Their dual courses and online degree programs helped me learn in multiple directions. The mentors boosted my skills and confidence, and the experience truly transformed the way I learn.

testimonialCards.name: Gayathri Prayaga
testimonialCards.review: Teksversity Education Institution exceeded my expectations! The faculty is knowledgeable and supportive. The curriculum is relevant and industry-focused. I appreciated the career services and opportunities provided. Highly recommended!

testimonialCards.name: Raghavenderan G
testimonialCards.review: Great institute with quality education at an affordable price. They offer trending, industry-ready courses and practical, supportive teaching. Their tie-ups with top universities add huge value. Highly recommended for strong learning and career growth.

testimonialCards.name: Laxmi Gayathri Chelimeda
testimonialCards.review: I took the Data Science course at Teksversity and gained strong practical, hands-on knowledge. The mentors were very supportive and explained concepts clearly. I’m also grateful for the career opportunity I received. A great learning experience
